pageCaption.value: Convinced that the goal of architecture is to transform, British-Ghanaian architecture mentor Sir David Adjaye and his protégée Mariam Issoufou from Niger set about producing a concrete result for social good, with Issoufou designing a major cultural complex for her country’s capital, Niamey.

metadescription.value: Mentor David Adjaye and his protégée Mariam Issoufou are using architecture for social good in Niger’s capital. Watch the video on rolex.org.

description.value: Rolex Mentor and Protégée in Architecture, 2018 – 2019

text.value: Convinced that the goal of architecture is to transform, Ghanaian-British architecture mentor Sir David Adjaye and his protégée Mariam Issoufou from Niger set about producing a concrete result for social good, with Issoufou designing a major cultural complex for her country’s capital, Niamey.

pageTitle.value: Peter Zumthor and Gloria Cabral - Video

pageCaption.value: Gloria Cabral, from Asunción in Paraguay, spent weeks at the Swiss studio of her mentor Peter Zumthor, who involved her in the whole process of building a tea chapel in South Korea, opening up her mind “in a radical way”.

WaPageTitle.value: Peter Zumthor and Gloria Cabral - Video

metadescription.value: Through the Rolex mentoring programme, mentor Anne Lacaton and architect Arine Aprahamian collaborated on an urban renewal project in Beirut. Watch the video on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Kazuyo Sejima and Yang Zhao - Video

pageCaption.value: Japanese mentor Kazuyo Sejima and protégé Yang Zhao believe architecture is about more than constructing buildings – it’s about changing lives. They put their conviction into practice with a humanitarian project as Zhao designs a community gathering place in a tsunami-devastated area.

WaPageTitle.value: Kazuyo Sejima and Yang Zhao - Video

pageCaption.value: Dance is a wordless art form with few guidebooks, so for two choreographers − hip-hop dancer Khoudia Touré, from Senegal, and Canadian superstar choreographer Crystal Pite — to work face-to-face was a priceless experience.

metadescription.value: Dance is a wordless art form with few guidebooks, so for two choreographers − hip-hop dancer Khoudia Touré, from Senegal, and Canadian superstar choreographer Crystal Pite — to work face-to-face was a priceless experience.

pageCaption.value: Irish writer Colin Barrett recognizes that writing is a solitary pursuit, but also acknowledges the need to escape solitude and meet other people and fellow authors.

metadescription.value: Irish writer Colin Barrett recognizes that writing is a solitary pursuit, but also acknowledges the need to escape solitude and meet other people and fellow authors.

pageTitle.value: Sir David Chipperfield and Simon Kretz - Video

pageCaption.value: For Sir David Chipperfield and his Swiss protégé Simon Kretz, the mentoring year provided the perfect opportunity for a detailed examination of the impact of architecture on society – how buildings can create strong communities if they relate to people and the environment.
